name: robot_execution_create
description: Trigger a new robot execution with a human message or event. Returns the execution ID and acceptance status for tracking.

trigger_type.description: Trigger type: 'human' for user messages, 'event' for system events (default: human)

messages.description: Messages to send (for human trigger type)

source.description: Event source identifier (for event trigger type)

event_type.description: Event type name (for event trigger type)

data.description: Event payload data (for event trigger type)
